data.title: 新Twitch频道开通
data.summary: Attention, Sensei! We've opened up a brand new Twitch channel for special Blue Archive streams! Join
data.body:
Attention, Sensei!
We've opened up a brand new Twitch channel for special Blue Archive streams!
Join CM Arcie in her new Twitch Clubhouse with additional streams starting very soon!

➡️ Blue Archive’s Official Twitch Channel:https://www.twitch.tv/bluearchiveofficial
![G-shsudbQAEQRhX.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/18613/n6MrZCV0A5t0bfRKjNnNkmjNuPzWfOOu.jpg)
